URL: https://gehu.ac.in/haldwani/admissions/
TITLE: Graphic Era Admission 2025 | GEHU, Haldwani

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Calendar Academic Fee Structures
- Academics Computer Science and Engineering School of Management Computer Science and Applications Hospitality Management Media and Mass Communication
- With a diverse range of UG, PG, and Doctoral programs, you will have the opportunity to pursue your passion and develop the necessary skills to thrive in today’s competitive job market. Our state-of-the-art infrastructure, expert faculty, and diverse student body will provide you with an unparalleled education that fosters intellectual curiosity and personal growth. Don’t miss the chance to become part of a vibrant and dynamic community that will support you on your journey towards success. Join Graphic Era Hill University now!
- The admission process at Graphic Era is solely based on the merit of the qualifying examination, and the entire process can be completed online. It’s essential to note that Graphic Era does not outsource any of its admission activities. Therefore, be careful of imposters who may try to deceive you by posing as representatives of Graphic Era. If you require any clarifications, please contact Graphic Era through email at enquiry@gehu.ac.in or call their Toll-Free number: 1800 890 6027
- Top Placements: Our students enjoy consistently high placements at top MNCs like Amazon, Uber, TCS, American Express and more. We strive to provide our students with the best career opportunities, and our exceptional placements serve as a testament to our efforts.
- Merit-Based Scholarships: We offer merit-based scholarships in all courses for the entire duration of the program. We believe in recognizing and supporting the academic achievements of our students and helping them achieve their full potential.
- Additional Scholarships: We strive to ensure that deserving children are not deprived of the opportunity and tools to flourish in the world and therefore, offer a 25% concession for domiciles of hill states, a 10% additional scholarship for female candidates and a 5% fee concession for wards of defense personnel.
- Accreditations and Rankings: Our university holds top-tier rankings and accreditations, some of which are exclusive to the region. We have earned these recognitions through our unwavering commitment to providing the highest quality education and experiences to our students.
- The initial and crucial step in the application process involves choosing the program that aligns with your interests, and core skills. With a wide array of programs available at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels, making an informed decision is paramount.
- Although this step can be performed while you visit our campus or one of our Pan India admission centres, we advise that you start your application online. This ensures timely updates and a hassle free paperless admission process.
- The Online application process allows you to fill up forms on multiple levels and submitting your qualifying documents
- Carefully review your application and your credentials and then submit the application form
- Once your form is successfully submitted, complete the application fee payment (₹ 1500 for all courses)
- The final course fee can be paid once Step 5 is completed by choosing the appropriate payment mode. The final/provisional allotment letter will be provided digitally along with other course commencement information.
- The application process at Graphic Era is strictly based on the Merit of the qualifying examination with the entire Admission Process available for completion online

URL: https://gehu.ac.in/haldwani/scholarships/
TITLE: Scholarships - Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Calendar Academic Fee Structures
- Academics Computer Science and Engineering School of Management Computer Science and Applications Hospitality Management Media and Mass Communication
- The University introduces handsome scholarships Year on Year, which often have proven to be the trend setters for private Universities in India. This document provides clarity on the Types of Scholarships and Waivers that students have the possibility of availing depending on their candidatures
- The Fee Structure at Graphic Era , clearly mentions the Academic Scholarships provided in all courses defined in various categories based on the merit of the candidate obtained in the qualifying examination considered for admission into that specific course.
- The Academic Scholarships provided in the Fee Structure has been defined for the entire course duration. The Scholarship bracket availed by the candidate at the time of the admission is frozen for the entire duration of the course. There is no change in the scholarship amount during the course, however the candidate will have to score a minimum aggregate of 7 SGPA, in order for the scholarship to applied in each semester. For candidates who fail to score 7 SGPA or above in any of the semesters, the scholarship will not be applicable for that particular semester. If the candidate is able to score 7 SGPA or above in the subsequent semester(s), the scholarship will be reinstated. In addition to the aforementioned 7 SGPA clause, the same terms are applicable on the student obtaining a backlog (failing to pass a subject) in a semester. If the student scores 7 SGPA or above but has still scored a backlog in a subject, the scholarship for that semester will be discontinued.
- The fee structure clearly mentions the amount of the Academic Scholarship available to candidates or the entire course duration. This amount remains fixed for the entire course duration.
- There are a number of other scholarships/concessions that the candidates might be eligible for – please do not confuse this with the Academic Scholarship – the amounts for this are mentioned clearly under the head “Academic Scholarship” in the Fee Structures corresponding to all courses.
- Fee Concession For Female Candidates (10% On Net Tuition Fee)
- An integral part of our Scholarship structure is the vision to empower females in various disciplines across the country, and as a part of this effort, Graphic Era has been running a special scholarship scheme for all Female Candidates in the University
- An additional 10% Scholarship is provided to all female candidates (across all courses) on the Net Tuition Fee. This Scholarship is termed additional, as it will be applicable to candidates regardless of whether they are availing Academic Scholarship or not.
- Fee Concession For Wards Of Defence Personnel (5% On Net Tuition Fee)
- Graphic Era has a rich legacy of respecting the service of the Personnel of the brave defence forces of India, and as a no questions asked benefit being passed on to the community, the University has a blanket Fee Concession of 5% on the Net Tuition Fee for all candidates who are wards of Defence Personnel.
- This category covers Current and Ex-Servicemen from the Indian Armed Forces (Indian Army, Indian Air Force, Indian Navy and all Paramilitary Forces) across all levels.
- The candidate will be required to provide proof of employment for their parent(s) in the categories mentioned above.
- Graphic Era values it’s Alumni, and wishes to assist them in attaining Higher Education to the extent that they aspire to. In order to ease out the process of attaining degrees higher than graduation, the University provides a Loyalty Concession of 10% on the Net Tuition Fee for all candidates who have attained a UG Degree from any of the institutions falling under the purview of Graphic Era Group of Institutions.
- The difference between Year of Passing out and the Year of enrolling in a PG Course bear no importance in this concession. Any and every one falling into the aforementioned criterion will be provided this benefit.
- Sibling Concession: (7.5% - Current Student and 5% - Alumni on NET TUITION FEE)
- The University, its students and its Alumni are one big family and with this clear understanding, we aspire to provide financial assistance to candidates who are immediate siblings of a current student of Graphic Era or an Alumni of any of the institutions under Graphic Era Group of Institutions.
- There are two sub-categories of concessions in this category:
- Current Student: Immediate Siblings of a student who is currently a student of Graphic Era will be eligible for a Fee Concession of 7.5% on the NET TUITION FEE.
- Alumni: Immediate Siblings of a student who is an Alumni of Graphic Era, will be eligible for a Fee Concession of 5% on the NET TUITION FEE.
- IMPORTANT CONDITIONS:1. The concession is applicable only for immediate siblings and not for cousins or any other distant sibling relation. 2. If two candidates (real siblings) are seeking admission at the same time, with no sibling already studying at Graphic Era or passed out from Graphic Era, only one of the two students will be eligible for the Sibling Concession (7.5%) – which of the two candidates wishes to receive the Concession is up to the candidate and their family. 3. If the status of the a current student of Graphic Era, who’s sibling has just taken admission at the University, changes from Current Student to Alumni, during the course of the younger sibling – the concession will be revised from 7.5% to 5% as soon as the elder sibling passes out of the University
- Download Full Scholarship Policy Graphic Era University 2023 Policy
- Policy For The Application Of The Scholarships/concessions
- Since there are a number of scholarships that a candidate may be eligible for, there is a formal rule that defines the maximum number of scholarships a candidate may avail. The rule is defined as below, along with a use case that clarifies all scenarios:
- Mandatory Scholarship (For Candidates eligible as per the different criterions defined in the corresponding section) –
- All other scholarships are additional scholarships that are added on top of the Academic Scholarship.As a formal rule, a maximum of 3 Scholarships/Concessions can be availed by a candidate in additionto the Academic Scholarship (Academic Scholarship + 3 Additional Scholarships/Concessions). Thesescholarships are applied in descending order, in order to provide the maximum benefit to thecandidate.
- Candidate A is seeking admission at Graphic Era – He is eligible for ACADEMIC SCHOLARSHIP, FemaleCandidate Scholarship, Ward of Defence Personnel, Loyalty Concession and Sibling Concession(7.5%). The order of the Scholarship/Concession granted will be as below:
- Academic Scholarship → Female Candidate (10%) → Loyalty Concession (10%) → Sibling Concession(7.5%)
- So, as per the rule – Academic Scholarship + 3 – the aforementioned discounts were provided –Defence Scholarship wasn’t included as it carries a lower value (5%) as compared to the otherconcessions that the candidate was eligible for, and since there are only a maximum of 3Scholarships that can be applied on top of the Academic Scholarship, the aforementioned scenariowas the one that provided the highest concession possible.
- An additional 5% Concession on Net Tuition Fee is applicable for candidates who choose to pay theirCourse Fees in Annual Mode i.e. Depositing their Course Fee for an entire year together. Thisconcession is only applicable to yearly payment mode and candidates paying their fees in half-yearlymode will not be provided any concession.
- It is important to note that this concession is applied after all of the above scholarships have beencalculated – this is not a part of the Mandatory Scholarships + 3 rule.
- All scholarships are provided on the condition of the candidates providing valid documentsconcerning the criterion. Failure to provide the same will result in immediate cancellation of thescholarship allotted, and in cases of fake documentation provided – the candidate will be liable tohave his/her admission cancelled, in addition to recovery of dues and legal proceedings that mayfollow.
- The application process at Graphic Era is strictly based on the Merit of the qualifying examination with the entire Admission Process available for completion online

The university is committed to providing a comprehensive and contemporary curriculum that equips students with the necessary knowledge and skills to excel in their chosen fields. The university’s industry collaborations, internships, and practical training programs are designed to ensure that students are well-prepared for the demands of the professional world. By aligning with industry trends and fostering strong industry connections, the university prepares students for diverse career opportunities and equips them with the skills and knowledge sought after by employers.
- The university is committed to promoting inclusivity and providing equal opportunities for all deserving students. It offers a range of merit-based academic scholarships and sponsorship schemes designed to support meritorious individuals, female candidates, students from hilly regions, wards of defense personnel, and those affected by natural disasters. These initiatives aim to empower deserving students and enable them to pursue their educational aspirations.
- If you seek an institution that offers a transformative and comprehensive learning experience, GEHU, Haldwani is an excellent choice. With its innovative academic practices, global outlook, experienced faculty members, industry collaborations, research opportunities, and a proven track record of successful placements, the campus provides an ideal environment for students to achieve academic and professional excellence. Join Graphic Era Hill University today and embark on an inspiring journey of personal and intellectual growth that will shape your future.

The Department of Hospitality Management at Graphic Era Hill University is one of the finest institutions in the field of hospitality management in northern India, providing the best placement in the region including international placements from Campus itself.
- The Hospitality Management Department specializes in teaching and researching hospitality and tourism-related topics. It is a multidisciplinary field that combines principles of management, marketing, economics, and human resources with the unique challenges of the hospitality industry.
- The hospitality industry encompasses a wide range of businesses, including hotels, restaurants, bars, event planning, and tourism. The program includes topics such as food and beverage management, hospitality law, revenue management, customer service, tourism management, and event planning.
- In addition to classroom learning, this program also requires students to complete internships. These experiences provide students with hands-on experience in the industry and help them develop the skills necessary to succeed in their future careers.
- One of the key benefits of studying hospitality management is the potential for a rewarding and exciting career. The hospitality industry is known for its fast-paced and dynamic nature, and there are many opportunities for growth and advancement within the field. Graduates of hospitality management programs may go on to work in a variety of roles, including hotels management, Fine dining stand-alone restaurants, Cruise liners, Retail sectors, Cloud Kitchens, Sales & Marketing, Airlines sector, FMCG, Entrepreneurs, Sommeliers, Bartenders, restaurant managers, event planning, tourism marketing, and more.
- Beyond preparing students for successful careers, the Department of Hospitality Management at Graphic Era Hill University also plays an important role in advancing knowledge and research in the hospitality field. Faculty members within the department may conduct research on topics such as consumer behavior in the hospitality industry, sustainability in the hospitality industry, or the impact of technology on the industry.
- Overall, the Department of Hospitality Management is an important academic unit within Graphic Era Hill University that prepares students for careers in the hospitality industry. Through a combination of classroom learning and hands-on experience, students develop the skills necessary to succeed in a variety of roles within the industry. Additionally, the department plays an important role in advancing knowledge and research in the field of hospitality management.

URL: https://gehu.ac.in/haldwani/university-life/
TITLE: University Life - Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Calendar Academic Fee Structures
- Academics Computer Science and Engineering School of Management Computer Science and Applications Hospitality Management Media and Mass Communication
- Catch a glimpse of the most happening campus around…
- Catch a glimpse of the most happening campus around, not just because of the modern and vibrant architecture taking you away from the conventional feel of boxy concrete blocks, but because of all Graphians who actually make you feel like home
- The Campus life is the benchmark for all Universities and Educational institutes in the region, with everything from International Level Celebrity Events to a peaceful evening stroll with the sound of classics running in the background on the Community Radio possible, within the bounds of the massive campus.
- The campus is buzzing with numerous events and activities that the students can organize and participate in during their stay the University. The events vary in shapes, sizes and scale and cater to students of varied interests.
- The Students at Graphic Era hail from different nationalities and almost all the states of India, ensuring a diverse and culturally rich crowd to interact with. The students also hail from varied domains thus ensuring that students of different approaches and thoughts and professions learn from each other on a daily basis. The social life at GEU thus, is extremely colorful and productive to say the least.
- Our beautiful campus is beaming with energy at all times and promises that you’ll never have a dull moment. The Campus houses multiple student led- clubs and activities that keep our students engaged in a plethora of varied events ranging from Cultural to Sports. The varied student fests followed by one of the grandest Campus Fests of the country, GRAFEST, promises an enthralling environment for Graphians throughout the year.
- Year on Year – The most happening University Fest in all of India – Grafest is a brand that the biggest International Sensations have endorsed, just because of the sheer scale and the energy in the crowd that is a part of it. Enter this space to get a sense of what you’re missing out on, if you’re not a Graphian!
- The legacy of the biggest gathering of India’s greatest ever poets continues. The annual Kavi-Sammelan at Graphic Era has witnessed greats like Dr. Rahat Indori every year, with the University not just treating its students with unparalleld intellect on display but honoring the diminishing art of writing and delivering poetic pearls
- India’s looking to get fitter with everyone from Politicians to Atheletes throwing and accepting fitness challenges. Once at Graphic Era though, we can assure you, there is no challenge that you cannot beat. World Record Creating Cyclists to National Level Footballers and Cricketers, this is a legacy you have to be a part of to believe
- The Campus might be the best place to be, but you would still need a break. The University takes care of that too, with Trekking and Hiking Trips organized every semester at a massive scale, with even the Top Brass participating with the students. This is a major stress buster for everyone from Geeks to Trendy Hipsters. The location of the University really helps
- The Armed Forces are an inseparable part of the philosophy of the state of Uttarakhand, and this is reflected in the form of the Cadets you would see around the campus, preparing for their parades and rigorous training to be a part of the forces. From participating in the Republic and Independence Day official parades to getting inducted in the Armed Forces, the NCC Team at Graphic Era has innumerable stories to tell
- Student Clubs are the heart and soul of Graphic Era student experience. These clubs provide a vibrant, collective and fun community to suit the needs of our diverse student body. Whether you are interested in career, cultural or sports clubs, there is always more going on than you could ever have time for. Clubs provide students with an opportunity to explore their areas of interest.
- TEDxGraphicEraUniversity has been organized twice by an extremely driven team of students and faculties, with both versions receiving great acclaim and applaud. The events were carefully crafted with the best of the speakers from distinctly varied domains gathering on the stage at Graphic Era University and relaying their stories and thoughts to everyone all across the globe.
- The event saw prominent speakers like Dr. Sudhanshu Trivedi (Hon’ble MP, RajyaSabha and National Spokesperson, BJP), Prof. Kamal Ghanshala, Founder President, Graphic Era Group of Institutions, Popular Author, Mr. Chetan Bhagat, Executive Director, DD News. Mr. Ashok Srivastava and many more. Check out these videos and listen to the enthralling talks of these stalwarts
- The Sports committee believes in developing the overall personality of students. It organizes inter and intra-college level football, cricket, basketball tournaments. There are also facilities for all indoor games including Table Tennis, Badminton, Billiards, Carom and Chess etc. The sport week is organized in each session where students participate with full enthusiasm.
- College buses pickup and drop day-scholars from specified locations in Dehradun city and en-route, on payment of a nominal fee. City bus facility is also available from college gate to city from morning 7.00 a.m. to evening 9.00 p.m. at frequent intervals of 15 minutes.
- Variety is the spice of life – this is what our cafeterias reflect. Our canteens offers vegetarian delicacies and caters to the diverse palates, and for the health freaks, we have a dedicated juice counter providing fresh fruit juices. Delicious food is prepared according to strict standards of hygiene.
- A guest house comprising 12 AC and Non-AC rooms is available within the campus to the guardians on actual availability basis on nominal charges.
- Residential Living provides a safe environment in innumerable residence halls, dining service with nutritious and sustainable meals, cultivates community feeling and enhances your educational experience on campus. Every effort is made that the hostellers get a homely ambience by providing them a home away from home.
- Tastefully designed state-of-the-art mess buildings, separate for boys and girls have been created inside the campus, which are equipped with modern hygienic mechanized kitchens consisting of latest advanced equipments to cater 400 students at a time.
- A place to let your imagination run wild and creativity flow with ease, this is an incubation for brainstorming, design and execution. Here, one can capture sessions of lecturers for digital learning, record multiple means of media (audio/visual), and create the best of content for their audience and portfolio.
- The application process at Graphic Era is strictly based on the Merit of the qualifying examination with the entire Admission Process available for completion online

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Calendar Academic Fee Structures

- Study Abroad with the Top Universities in the World
- Graphic Era enjoys collaborations with some of the best Universities in the world, opening up a host of opportunities for its students. The collaborations provide students a chance to pursue various engagement programs at these universities during their study here at Graphic Era. The students can choose from a variety of programs, including Internships, Semester Exchange Programs, 2+2, 3+1, 1+1, Dual Degree Programs, and other variations of Credit Transfer Programs.
- Such associations allow students to earn new skill sets and attain global exposure at a significantly lower cost without compromising on the merits and the duration of their primary degree program at Graphic Era. The institutions in the collaboration list include some Top Ranked Institutions from various countries offering these opportunities from varied domains. The list of the countries provided below can be explored further to evaluate the list of offerings from Institutions in the respective country. The list is constantly updated basis the MoUs and Agreements signed between Graphic Era and these institutions
- Graphic Era’s legacy rests on the bedrock values of academic excellence, opportunity, inclusivity, and a commitment to create a better world. The university regards international exposure as a quintessential part of quality education and provides abundant opportunities to its students to experience global, cross-cultural learning. The goal is to equip students with the skills, knowledge, and attitudes needed to responsibly participate and thrive in the exceptionally globalized world of the 21st century. The university achieves this through MoUs, collaborations and tie-ups with reputed international universities that facilitate exchange of students and faculty, joint research, study visits, immersion programmes, and more.
- The Department of International Affairs plays an active role in broadening the horizons of the faculty, students and staff members of Graphic Era through strategic alliances with foreign educational institutes. The proactive department develops, nurtures and implements the university’s global endeavors and supports the internationalization of Graphic Era campus.

TITLE: Chancellor’s Message - Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Calendar Academic Fee Structures
- Academics Computer Science and Engineering School of Management Computer Science and Applications Hospitality Management Media and Mass Communication
- Campus on a tour designed for prospective graduate and professional students. You will see how our university like, facilities, studenst and life in this university. Meet our graduate admissions representative to learn more about our graduate programs and decide what it the best for you.
- We strive to create a learning environment for students where they unfold their potential and closely interact with the practitioners from the corporate world
- Today as I look back at the accomplishments of Graphic Era in last 30 years. From Graphic Era Institute of Technology to Graphic Era University and Graphic Era Hill University, it has progressed and kept abreast of the rapid changes taking place in the field of academic, pedagogical spheres and growing demand of industry for highly skilled manpower. Today colleges and universities are facing changing student.
- Message from the Desk of Chancellor, Prof. (Dr) Kamal Ghanshala
- Today as I look back at the accomplishments of Graphic Era in last 30 years. From Graphic Era Institute of Technology to Graphic Era University and Graphic Era Hill University, it has progressed and kept abreast of the rapid changes taking place in the field of academic, pedagogical spheres and growing demand of industry for highly skilled manpower. Today colleges and universities are facing changing student demographics, issues of quality and value and increased competition. Their success requires transformative change to enable new teaching and learning approaches. As higher education is rapidly evolving, Graphic Era is at the cutting edge of the movement. We are competing boldly and taking new paths—yet staying grounded to our mission of delivering quality education, building teaching excellence, introducing innovative study programs, customizing and updating our course content to match the industry requirements, setting records in placement, research and consultancy.
- Creative and inventive culture, nurtured by our faculty, students and staff, is transforming how we train our students and help them to strengthen their future prospects. In developing Graphic Era Hill University, we have partnered with leaders in corporate sector and research organizations of the country and international universities, for training and placements of our students. We’re leveraging these creative partnerships to stretch our boundaries of excellence collaboration, innovation and creation of skills, across numerous disciplinary fronts. The deep integration of technology in learning has made learning mobile and self-directed. The ultimate goal of learning is; critical thinking, generating work skills, communication, creativity, collaboration, character, education, and citizenship and technology is assisting in big way in accelerating these ideals and making learning irresistibly engaging. With recognition from prestigious institutions Graphic Era University is setting new benchmarks in education.
- For students the experience of being at Graphic Era Hill University is rich and diverse. Our academic programs are of high quality, geared towards industry requirements. They are competitive and industry driven, ranging from engineering, science, technology, business, management, commerce, hospitality to humanities and social sciences and our initiative expands to all round knowledge. Our curriculum and pedagogy includes certain ideological inputs, behavioral content and team building aspects, for enhancement of hard and soft skills amongst the students. University also offers study-abroad programs and internship programs in leading organizations of the country and international exposure at premier universities around the world.
- Our aim is to provide the best possible environment for teaching, learning and research to the diverse pool of young talent. The kind of resourcefulness and creativity that has become the hallmark of Graphic Era Hill University gives me immense pride in this institution, in the people who learn and work here, and in those who support our mission.
- Whether you are part of our Graphic Era Community, or in the process of joining us — through study programs or research — I am proud to welcome you to our vibrant campus.
- Received Edupreneurs Award-2017 for his contribution to the cause of quality education. The award was presented to him by Mr. Pranab Mukherjee, the former President of India.
- Received Distinguished Educationist Award -2016, conferred at The Icons Of Learning Conclave by Business Excellence Research Group (BERG) Singapore, for his immense contribution to the management of quality education and excellent teaching practices.
- Conferred the prestigious Best Manager of the Year Award in Science and Education Sphere 2015 by Europe Business Assembly in the prestigious International Summit of Leaders held at Oxford Town Hall, Oxford City United Kingdom on 15th December 2015.
- Honored as the Program Committee Chair for 4th International Conference on "Computer Communication and Management (ICCCM 2014)" organized in Paris, France on May 21-22, 2014.
- Conferred Best Paper Presentation award at the ‘International Conference on Intelligent Systems, Data Mining and Information Technology (ICIDIT), April 2014’, at Bangkok, Thailand.
- Received Excellent Paper Presentation Award on IT - Initiatives for Empowering Difficult Geographies , at 35th International Conference on Information Technology Interfaces in Cavtat, Croatia – June 24-27, 2013.
- Awarded Certificate for Excellent Paper at the 3rd International Conference on Computer Communication and Management (ICCCM) 2013’,at Copenhagen, Denmark, May 19-20, 2013.
- Conferred prestigious Dr B. C. Roy Award for social services related to health causes, in 2010.
- Conferred the International Gold Star Millennium Award at the International Conference on ‘Celebrating the Global Indian’, by His Excellency Mr. Korn Dabbaransi, Former Deputy Prime Minister of Thailand in 2008.
- Conferred the Uttarakhand Ratan Award for outstanding contribution to quality Technical and Higher education in Uttarakhand, in 2007.
- Prof.(Dr) Kamal Ghanshala is an engineer, entrepreneur and a philanthropist and posses excellent academic credentials with Bachelor’s and Master's degree in Computer Science & Engineering and Doctoral degree in Computer Science from Kumaon University, Nainital. GEU is a realization of his vision to put on Doon landscape a university that is all round enabler of excellence for youth.
- Prof Ghanshala is a proactive chancellor and a teacher par excellence. He is inarguably, one of the leading experts in teaching of Computer Aided Design (CAD) and ‘C’ language. His plethora of knowledge is not just confined to the four walls of university but also reflected in many research papers he has written and for which he been felicitated, at national and international levels, such as in Croatia, Denmark, Johannesburg, Turkey, London, Paris Germany and Thailand. He has received wide spread recognition for his leadership qualities and management acumen. He is also an avid sportsman.
- Under his dynamic leadership Graphic Era is at the cutting edge of educational innovations, new ideas and new practices.

URL: https://gehu.ac.in/dehradun/course/bachelor-of-design-b-des-in-interior-design/
TITLE: B.Des. in Interior Design - Graphic Era Hill University, Dehradun

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Fee Structure Academic Calendar Hostel Fee Brochure
- Academics Department of Computer Science and Engineering Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering Department of Mechanical Engineering Department of Civil Engineering School of Management Department of Computer Application Department of English School of Commerce B.Voc in Accounting & Finance Allied Sciences School of Agriculture Law Design
- Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
- The Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior Design is a 4 year undergraduate professional degree dedicated to the planning and creation of functional, safe, and aesthetically engaging interior environments. The program combines studio-based design learning with technical and theoretical knowledge to help students understand how spaces influence human behavior and wellbeing. Students are trained in space planning, construction detailing, materials and finishes, lighting design, furniture design, sustainability, and building services. Emphasis is placed on integrating creativity with practical knowledge of construction systems, building regulations, environmental responsibility and digital design technologies.
- This program is especially suited for students who are creative, detail-oriented, and enjoy solving practical problems through design fundamentals, processes and methods. Throughout the course, students develop strong visual communication, technical drafting, 3D visualization, project coordination and client presentation skills. The Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior Design is a promising career choice due to the growing demand driven by urbanization and real estate development worldwide. It offers strong freelance and entrepreneurial opportunities, global career mobility, and the ability to combine artistic talent with professional stability. This program is ideal for students who have a passion for art and design, demonstrate keen observation and attention to detail, are confident in using technology, and enjoy hands-on projects that turn creative concepts into functional, well-designed spaces.
- School of Design Graphic Era Hill University Bell Road, Clement Town Dehradun, Uttarakhand
- Launch your career in Design with our Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior Design. Experienced faculty, hands-on learning, and industry connections.
- Seats to be allocated based on projected scores(12th), calculated basis the candidate’s 10th percentage – only meritorious students
- All interested candidates should have passed Class XII from a recognized board of examination in any stream with not less than 55% marks.
- The core subjects of the Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior Design program are structured to build a strong foundation in both creative and technical aspects of interior environments. These subjects equip students with essential design principles, practical skills, and professional knowledge required to conceptualize, develop, and execute functional and aesthetically refined spaces.
- A Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior Design opens doors to diverse and rewarding career opportunities across multiple sectors. Graduates can pursue creative, technical, and entrepreneurial roles in residential, commercial, and specialized design fields, depending on their interests and expertise.
- Residential Interior Designer: Designs functional and aesthetically appealing homes, apartments and villas. Works closely with clients to personalize living spaces according to lifestyle and budget.
- Commercial Interior Designer: Plans and designs offices, corporate environments, and coworking spaces. Focuses on productivity, brand identity, and efficient space utilization.
- Hospitality Designer: Designs hotels, resorts, restaurants, and cafes to enhance guest experience. Combines ambiance, comfort, and brand storytelling in interior spaces.
- Retail & Exhibition Designer: Creates engaging showrooms, malls, and display environments. Designs spaces that attract customers and enhance product presentation.
- Furniture Designer: Develops custom furniture and interior fixtures for various settings. Integrates functionality, ergonomics, and innovative materials in product design.
- Set & Production Designer: Designs sets for films, television, theater, and events. Translates scripts and themes into immersive visual environments.
- Lighting Consultant: Specializes in architectural, decorative, and ambient lighting solutions. Ensures optimal illumination for functionality, mood and energy efficiency.
- Design Entrepreneur: Establishes an independent interior design firm or consultancy. Manages projects, clients, and business operations while building a personal brand.
- The Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior Design provides a dynamic learning experience that integrates creativity with professional practice. It emphasizes studio-based learning, industry exposure, portfolio development, interdisciplinary skills and sustainable design and development to prepare students for a smooth transition into the design profession.
- Studio-Based Learning: Emphasizes hands-on, project-oriented learning in a creative studio environment. Students work on real-world scenarios to develop problem-solving, conceptual thinking, and execution skills.
- Industry Exposure: Includes site visits, internships, master classes by industry professionals, and workshops for real-time understanding of professional practices, project execution, and market expectations.
- Portfolio Development: Students systematically build a professional portfolio throughout the program. The final portfolio showcases academic and practical work, serving as a key tool for employment and higher studies.
- Interdisciplinary Skills: Integrates creativity with technical drawing, digital visualization, communication, presentation skills, budgeting, and client coordination. Prepares students to manage projects holistically from concept to completion.
- Sustainable Design and Development: Incorporates eco-friendly materials, energy-efficient planning, and sustainable construction practices. Aligns design education with global environmental standards and green building principles.
- Tools and Software: Students engage in industry standard softwares such as viz., AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, 3ds Max and Adobe Creative Suite for drafting, modeling and visualization.
- What are the common Techniques used in Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior design?
- In a Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) in Interior design program, students learn a combination of creative, technical, digital, and research-based techniques to design functional and aesthetic interior spaces. The most common techniques used in academic and professional practice are viz., Hand sketching & drafting CAD & 3D modeling, Space planning, Ergonomic design, Lighting & material selection, Research & analysis, Presentation & portfolio development. These techniques prepare students for residential, commercial, retail, hospitality, and institutional interior design projects.
- Can Bachelor of Design in Interior design students specialize in a particular area of interest?
- Yes, Bachelor of Design (B.Des) in Interior Design students can specialize in a particular area of interest either during the final years of study or after graduation through internships, electives, and professional practice. Most programs start with broad foundational training (design principles, drafting, materials, construction), and then allow students to focus on specific sectors such as Residential Design, Commercial / Office Design, Retail Design, Hospitality Design (Hotels, Restaurants), Healthcare Interiors, Sustainable / Green Design, Furniture Design, Lighting Design, Technical/BIM Design (using tools like Autodesk Revit).
- How does a Bachelor of Design in Interior design prepare students for the industry?
- A Bachelor of Design (Interior Design) prepares students for the industry by combining creative skills, technical knowledge, practical exposure and professional training. Students are ready for the industry through a strong design foundation, technical skills with practical exposure, specialization projects, portfolio development, professional and communication skills.
- What are the benefits of studying a Bachelor of Design in Interior design?
- A Bachelor of Design in Interior Design provides a balance of creativity, technical expertise, and career flexibility, making it a rewarding professional choice. Graduates benefit from diverse career opportunities in residential, commercial, retail, and hospitality design, with options for higher studies or independent practice.
- The application process at Graphic Era is strictly based on the Merit of the qualifying examination with the entire Admission Process available for completion online

TITLE: Graphic Design & Animation Courses in Dehradun, B Des in Animation

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Fee Structure Academic Calendar Hostel Fee Brochure
- Academics Department of Computer Science and Engineering Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering Department of Mechanical Engineering Department of Civil Engineering School of Management Department of Computer Application Department of English School of Commerce B.Voc in Accounting & Finance Allied Sciences School of Agriculture Law Design
- Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
- Bachelor of Design (Animation, & Gaming Design) is a 4-year undergraduate program intended to train students to become professionals in the domain of 2d & 3D Animation, Visual Effects, Compositing, Storyboarding & Comics Design, and Info-graphics arts.
- B Design Animation and Gaming is a design-based program that emphasizes the creative and artistic aspects of animation and gaming. The program focuses on developing students’ skills in areas such as character design, visual storytelling, concept art, and animation techniques. The program also covers topics related to user experience and game design.
- The B Design Animation and Gaming program focuses on the design elements of 2D games that are playable on various platforms such as PC, online, and PSP. Through the program, students will gain a comprehensive understanding of game development concepts and mechanics. The primary goal is to provide students with the necessary technical and artistic skills essential for crafting top-notch animations and video games.
- While both programs are B.Sc. in Animation & Gaming, as well as B in Design Animation and Gaming, cover similar topics, B.Sc. in Animation and Gaming is more technical, while B. Design Animation and Gaming are more focused on design and creativity.
- Launch your career in Design with our B.Design Animation and Gaming program. Experienced faculty, hands-on learning, and industry connections.
- Seats to be allocated based on projected scores(12th), calculated basis the candidate’s 10th percentage – only meritorious students
- All interested candidates should have passed Class XII from a recognized board of examination in any stream with not less than 50% marks.
- Career opportunities for graduates of B Design Animation and Gaming are diverse and exciting.
- This all-inclusive course enhances and expedites your existing enthusiasm for computer games by imparting the necessary technical skills while reinforcing the essential academic foundation for your personal growth in the field.
- Some of the common job roles for B Design Animation and Gaming graduates are:
- Character Designer: Character designers create original and appealing characters for animation and gaming projects. They are responsible for developing the look, feel, and personality of the characters.
- Concept Artist: Concept artists create visual representations of ideas and concepts for animation and gaming projects. They help to visualize the overall look and feel of a project.
- Storyboard Artist: Storyboard artists create visual representations of the story and characters in animation and gaming projects. They help to plan the narrative and visual elements of the project.
- 3D Animator: 3D animators create animations of characters, objects, and environments for animation and gaming projects. They use software to create lifelike and engaging animations.
- Motion Graphics Designer: Motion graphics designers create animations, visual effects, and other elements for films, TV shows, and video games. They use a combination of design, animation, and video editing software to create engaging visuals.
- Game Designer: Game designers are responsible for creating the rules, mechanics, and gameplay of video games. They work closely with developers, artists, and other professionals to ensure that the game is engaging and enjoyable for players.
- Level Designer: Level designers create the levels, environments, and obstacles in video games. They work closely with game designers and artists to create engaging and challenging levels.
- UI/UX Designer: UI/UX designers are responsible for designing the user interface and user experience of video games and other interactive media. They ensure that the game is easy to navigate and enjoyable for players.
- Visual Effects Artist: Visual effects artists create special effects, such as explosions, fire, and smoke, for animation and gaming projects. They use software to create realistic and engaging effects.
- These are just a few examples of the many roles available in the animation and gaming industry. Graduates of B Design Animation and Gaming can pursue careers in various fields such as film, television, advertising, and gaming. Overall, Graphic Era Hill University’s B Design Animation and Gaming program aims to equip students with a broad range of skills and knowledge in the creative and technical aspects of animation and gaming.
- Students who are more inclined towards creative and artistic aspects may prefer the B Design program. Some of the main key highlights of the program will be around its core course structure.
- The first year of the B Design Animation and Gaming is usually dedicated to building a strong foundation in fundamental concepts, such as Digital Imaging, 3D Modelling and Texturing, Drawing & Sketching, Design fundamentals, and the History of animation.
- In the second year, students study advanced topics, such as Advanced Animation Techniques, Storyboarding and Narrative Development, and Character Design and Development.
- The final year of the program is focused on Visual Effects and Compositing, Motion Graphics, and Interactive Media Design along with this there are practical projects and internships, where students work on developing their portfolio and gain hands-on practical experience in the industry.
- Throughout the program, students also develop a range of transferable skills, such as teamwork, problem-solving, communication, and time management. These skills are essential for success in the animation and gaming industry, which requires collaboration and efficient project management.
- What are the common techniques used in B. Design Animation and Gaming?
- B. Design Animation and Gaming students learn a range of techniques including 2D and 3D animation, character rigging, motion graphics, visual effects, and game development. Students use software tools like Maya, Unity, and Adobe Creative Suite to create engaging and interactive content for mediums such as television, films, advertising, and games. By mastering these techniques, students can create captivating visual experiences that captivate and engage audiences.
- Can B. Design Animation and Gaming students specialize in a particular area of interest?
- Yes, B. Design Animation and Gaming students can specialize in areas that align with their interests and career goals. The students interested in game design can focus on game engines like Unity or Unreal Engine. They can learn how to create game mechanics, levels, and characters. Those interested in visual effects can learn compositing, particle effects, and motion tracking. Specializing helps students become experts, increasing their employability.
- How does B. Design Animation and Gaming prepare students for the industry?
- B. Design Animation and Gaming programs prepare students for the industry by providing hands-on experience with industry-standard software and tools. Students learn how to work in teams, manage projects, and communicate effectively. In addition to technical skills, students also develop soft skills like problem-solving, critical thinking, and creativity. The college also offers internships, industry projects, and mentorship programs to give students exposure to the industry and help them build professional networks.
- What are the benefits of studying B. Design Animation and Gaming?
- Studying B. Design Animation and Gaming offers a range of benefits. It allows students to explore their creativity and develop their artistic skills. They learn how to bring their ideas to life using software tools and techniques. The program equips students with valuable soft skills like problem-solving, critical thinking, and communication, which are highly sought after by employers.

- The Bachelor of Design (User Experience and Interaction Design) program is an innovative and cutting-edge pathway that prepares students to excel in the fast-paced world of user interface and user experience design. This comprehensive program immerses students in the art and science of creating intuitive and visually captivating digital experiences, catering to the needs of today’s tech-savvy users. By exploring a diverse range of core attributes and unique features, students develop a deep understanding of design principles and emerging technologies, empowering them to shape the digital landscape of the future.
- Intuitive User Experiences: Through a hands-on and project-based approach, students learn to create intuitive user experiences that seamlessly blend aesthetics with functionality. They delve into design thinking methodologies, allowing them to empathize with users, identify pain points, and deliver solutions that enhance usability and delight.
- AI and IoT Integration: The program stands at the forefront of technological advancements, incorporating AI and IoT-enabled user interface design. Students gain expertise in creating smart, interconnected systems that adapt to users’ preferences and behaviors, revolutionizing how humans interact with technology.
- Immersive Design Exploration: The program embraces the frontier of immersive experience design, including augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), and extended reality (XR). Students embark on an exhilarating journey to craft captivating and interactive virtual worlds, shaping the future of entertainment, education, and various industries.
- Smart Wearable Innovation: The program places emphasis on smart wearable products, exploring the intersection of fashion and technology. Students learn to design wearables that merge style with cutting-edge functionality, redefining how we interact with wearable devices and integrating them seamlessly into our lives.
- Transdisciplinary and Multidisciplinary Specializations: The program offers a unique opportunity for students to explore diverse domains and collaborate with experts or students from different disciplines. Whether it’s computer science, healthcare, gaming, education, or fintech, students can specialize and create transformative experiences that cater to specific industries.
- Research-Driven Curriculum: As a research-based program, the program fosters a culture of exploration and innovation. Students engage in research projects, studying user behaviors, emerging technologies, and design trends, empowering them to make informed design decisions backed by data-driven insights.
- App-Centric Service Experience Design: The program places a strong focus on app-based service experiences, preparing students to create seamless and delightful app interfaces. From on-demand services to e-commerce platforms, students learn to craft apps that elevate user satisfaction and drive business success.
- Human-Centered Design Philosophy: Human factors and human-centered design research form the backbone of the program’s approach. Students learn to put the end-users at the heart of their design process, ensuring that their creations resonate with real-world needs and preferences.
- Launch your career in Design with our Bachelor of Design (User Experience and Interaction Design) program. Experienced faculty, hands-on learning, and industry connections.

- In today’s digital age, graduates with a Bachelor of Design (User Experience and Interaction Design) degree are among the most sought-after professionals in the job market. The increasing emphasis on user-centric design and seamless digital experiences has elevated the importance of UI/UX designers in various industries. A few potential career paths that graduates can look forward to, include:
- The Bachelor of Design (User Experience and Interaction Design) program offers an array of key highlights that equip students with the skills and knowledge to thrive in the rapidly evolving world of user interface and user experience design:
- Design Studio: The program provides a dedicated design studio space where students can immerse themselves in a creative and collaborative environment. It serves as a hub for brainstorming ideas, developing concepts, and refining designs.
- Nurturing Creative Mindsets: The curriculum is designed to foster and nurture creative mindsets among students. They are encouraged to think outside the box, explore innovative solutions, and push the boundaries of design.
- Design Thinking and Problem-Solving Abilities: Through focused training in design thinking, students learn to identify user needs, empathize with their target audience, and develop user-centric solutions. This approach enhances their problem-solving abilities and helps them create impactful designs.
- In-House Live Projects & Assignments: The program incorporates real-world projects and assignments within the institution, allowing students to gain practical experience and apply their skills in authentic scenarios. These opportunities enable them to build a strong portfolio and enhance their employability.
- Industry Collaboration: The program emphasizes collaboration with industry professionals and companies, providing students with exposure to real industry challenges and trends. This collaboration ensures that the curriculum remains relevant and aligned with current industry requirements.
- Curriculum as per the Latest Industry Trends: The program is designed to stay up-to-date with the latest developments and trends in the UI/UX design field. This ensures that students are equipped with the most relevant and sought-after skills, making them industry-ready upon graduation.
- World-class Infrastructure: Students benefit from a state-of-the-art infrastructure that replicates industry standards. Equipped with advanced tools and technology, including CNC laser cutting machines, 3D printers, and a MAC Lab with software like Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, Premiere Pro, Figma, Autodesk Fusion 360, and KeyShot, students can bring their design ideas to life and gain hands-on experience with industry-standard tools.
- While coding skills are not always mandatory for UI/UX design, having a basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript can be beneficial, especially when it comes to prototyping and collaborating with developers.
- How is B.Design (UI/UX) affected by emerging technologies like VR, AR, and AI?
- B.Design (UI/UX) programs often incorporate emerging technologies and their impact on user experiences. Students may learn about designing interfaces for virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) applications, as well as how artificial intelligence (AI) influences user interactions with digital products.
- Are there any specific software or tools that students will learn to use in the program?
- In the B.Design (UI & UX) program, students will learn to use a range of software and tools relevant to the field, such as Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe After Effects, Adobe Premiere Pro, Figma, Autodesk Fusion 360, KeyShot, and more. These tools are widely used for creating wireframes, prototypes, and visual designs for user interfaces. Many such skills will be taught which are essential for designing and visualizing products effectively.

Our curriculum empowers designers to create high-impact solutions rooted in deep cultural and social understanding.
- Product design bridges the gap between human needs and material solutions. This course invites students to explore the synergy between functionality, ergonomics, and aesthetic innovation. Through rigorous experimentation with both physical materials and digital systems, students develop a platform for creative problem-solving and distinct personal expression.

- Sustainability & Circular Economy: Become a design leader by learning circular design principles. Master material science and zero-waste manufacturing to help brands transition to eco-conscious products, a top priority for 21st-century global industries.

- Bachelor of Science in Animation & Gaming is a 3-year undergraduate Animation and Multimedia program. The program offers detailed learning in animation, innovative filmmaking, and a professional gaming interface, structurally designed to meet industry requirements.
- B.Sc. Animation & Gaming is a 3-year undergraduate degree program that has a universal appeal as it caters to both theoretical and practical aspects by enhancing creative and innovative skills as well as critical thinking. The students are trained as per contemporary advancement through a very robust curriculum that is inspired by global art and design highlights with Drawing, Painting, Graphic design, 2D and 3D Animation, Gaming, Filmmaking, VFX, Camera, and Photography.
- The Bachelor of Science course in Animation & Gaming focuses on the creation of 2D games designed for various platforms such as PC, online, and PSP. Students will acquire knowledge in game development principles and mechanics, with the objective of developing their technical and artistic abilities to produce exceptional animations and video games.
- The duration of the program is typically three years and is divided into six semesters. During this time, students learn about various aspects of animation and gaming, including design, graphics, animation, character development, storytelling, game programming, and more.
- Launch your career in Design with our B.Sc. in Animation and Gaming program. Experienced faculty, hands-on learning, and industry connections.
- Seats to be allocated based on projected scores(12th), calculated basis the candidate’s 10th percentage – only meritorious students
- All interested candidates should have passed Class XII from a recognized board of examination in any stream with not less than 50% marks.
- Career opportunities for graduates of B.Sc. Animation and Gaming are diverse and exciting. This course drives and streamlines your passion for computer games by training students in required technical skills and strengthening the academic base essential in the development of the theory.
- There are various roles that graduates of B.Sc. Animation and Gaming can pursue. Some of the common job roles in the animation and gaming industry are:
- Animator: Animators create and design 2D and 3D animated characters, objects, and backgrounds for films, television shows, and video games.
- Game designer: Game designers are responsible for creating the rules, mechanics, and gameplay of video games. They work closely with developers, artists, and other professionals to ensure that the game is engaging and enjoyable for players.
- Concept artist: Concept artists create sketches and illustrations that help to visualize the ideas and concepts for video games, films, and TV shows. They work closely with game designers and art directors to create the look and feel of the game or animation.
- Character artist: Character artists create 3D models of characters for video games and animations. They are responsible for creating the look, feel, and movement of characters.
- Game developer: Game developers write code and develop software to create video games. They are responsible for programming game mechanics, physics, and artificial intelligence.
- Game tester: Game testers play games before their release to identify and report any bugs, glitches, or other issues that need to be fixed.
- 3D modeler: 3D modelers create 3D models of objects, characters, and environments for video games and animations.
- Storyboard artist: Storyboard artists create visual representations of the story and characters in video games, TV shows, and films. They help to plan the narrative and visual elements of the project.
- Motion graphics designer: Motion graphics designers create animations, visual effects, and other elements for films, TV shows, and video games.
- These are just a few examples of the many roles available in the animation and gaming industry. Graduates of B.Sc. Animation and Gaming can pursue careers in various fields such as film, television, advertising, and gaming. B.Sc. Animation and Gaming is an excellent program for students who are passionate about creating visual content and are interested in pursuing a career in the animation and gaming industry. The program provides students with a solid foundation in the technical and artistic skills required for success in these fields, along with transferable skills that are valuable in any profession.
- The first year of the B.Sc. Animation & Gaming is usually dedicated to building a strong foundation in fundamental concepts, such as 2D and 3D animation, design principles, and programming languages.
- In the second year, students study advanced topics, such as 3D modelling and animation, game engine development, and game design.
- The final year of the program is focused on practical projects and internships, where students work on developing their portfolios and gain hands-on practical experience in the industry.
- Throughout the program, students also develop a range of transferable skills, such as teamwork, problem-solving, communication, and time management. These skills are essential for success in the animation and gaming industry, which requires collaboration and efficient project management.
- What kind of software and tools are used in B.Sc. Animation and Gaming?
- B.Sc. Animation and Gaming program features the use of a variety of software and tools. These include 3D modelling and animation software like Maya, which is commonly used in film and television production. Students also learn 2D animation software like Adobe Animate, which is often used in the creation of web-based animations and games. Additionally, game engines like Unity and Unreal Engine are used to develop interactive games and simulations.
- Is B.Sc. Animation and Gaming a theoretical or practical course?
- B.Sc. Animation and Gaming is primarily a practical course that emphasizes hands-on learning through projects and assignments. Students learn by creating animations, games, and other interactive media, which allows them to apply the concepts and techniques they learn in class. The course also includes theoretical components, such as lectures and discussions on animation and game design principles.
- Can I specialize in a specific area of animation or gaming in B.Sc. Animation and Gaming?
- Students in a Bachelor of Visual Arts program will work on a wide range of projects throughout their coursework. These projects include creating a series of paintings, designing a sculpture, producing a short film, or curating an art exhibition. Projects may be completed individually or in groups, and students will receive guidance and feedback from faculty members.
- What kind of projects can I expect to work on in B.Sc. Animation and Gaming?
- The program requires students to work on a variety of projects that allow them to develop their skills in animation and game design. These projects include creating short animated films, developing game prototypes, designing interactive installations, and creating augmented or virtual reality experiences. Projects can be individual or team-based and will be focused on specific areas of animation or game design depending on the student’s interests and specialization.

- Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
- Graphic Era Hill University (GEHU) stands as a beacon of academic excellence, driven by the visionary leadership of our Founder, Prof. (Dr.) Kamal Ghanshala, and a relentless pursuit of knowledge, innovation and holistic development. At GEHU, we take pride in nurturing value-driven individuals, competent professionals, and future leaders. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our world-class infrastructure, industry-aligned curriculum and emphasis on research, artificial intelligence, and technological innovation. Through strategic collaborations with global industry leaders like IBM, Adobe, Infosys and Capgemini, along with academic exchanges with prestigious institutions worldwide, we equip our students with unparalleled global exposure. With AI-driven learning methodologies and state-of-the-art labs, we empower students to harness the potential of emerging technologies. The university fosters an inclusive, diverse and vibrant learning environment where students are encouraged to think innovatively, challenge norms, and develop leadership and teamwork skills. Our graduates consistently achieve remarkable success, securing positions in top corporations such as Apple, Microsoft, Google, Amazon and Tata Technologies, reinforcing our reputation as a premier institution.
- At GEHU, education is more than just academics—it’s about shaping character, building resilience and inspiring dreams. We are deeply committed to instilling ethical values, social responsibility and a strong Indian ethos in our students, preparing them to make a meaningful impact on society. With AI integration in curriculum design, smart learning analytics and hands-on projects in machine learning and automation, we ensure that our students stay ahead in an evolving digital world. Our “question-by-example” approach to learning cultivates curiosity, adaptability and self-improvement, ensuring our students excel not just in their careers but also as responsible global citizens. With a thriving alumni network and an ever-growing legacy of excellence, we continue to evolve, driven by our mission to empower students with knowledge, skills and values. The future is bright, and we look forward to shaping it together—one success story at a time.
- PhD (EE) in Semiconductor Quantum Devices, North Carolina State University USA (1991-1995)MS(EE) in Computer Architecture, Duke University, USA (1989- 1990)BE in Electrical Engineering, M. S. University of Baroda (1981 – 1985)
- General Purpose and AI accelerator Processor Design, Machine Learning (ML) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) on “Edge Devices”, Internet of Things (IoT or Industry 4.0), VLSI design Hardware/Software co-design issues
- Experience of working in Academia and Industries both in India and abroad and forming mutually beneficial collaborative programs.
- Working with the Government / international agencies in framing the policy on IT and Electronics
- Excellent communication skills with good command over English, Gujarati and Hindi languages
- Complete curriculum overhaul with common curriculum for the first two years across all engineering streams. Strong emphasis on Mathematics education – which is the foundation of all computer science and ECE branches and for AI/ML related courses.
- Improved industry participation in the Board of Studies of various Engineering branches to keep the curriculum up to date.
- Formed Special Interest Groups (SIGs) among faculty members to align with university priorities
- Supervised design and infrastructure requirement for state of the art Centers of Excellence labs
- Created industry connects with top Hitech MNCs and cuttingedge startups
- Nurtured Center for Space Science & Technology (CSST) to build 3U satellite – with first launch in 2025.
- Developed a framework for faculty promotion policy and welfare activities. Proposed streamlined system and procedures for the smooth operations
- Overseen first NAAC application in which DSU achieved A+ grade
- Worked with the International Affairs department to increase foreign students’ intake and promote regular faculty exchange.
- Team leader in getting DAIICT selected as an “Anchor Institute” in the area of ICT under the Anchor Institute Program Scheme announced by the Center of Entrepreneurship Development (CED) – Department of Industry and Mines. Anchor Institute gets a grant of 10 crors to be used over 5 years. DAIICT as an anchor institute would be responsible for training students and faculty members of Gujarat state in the industry standard skill set
- Founded a startup called “Treepie Computing” involved in cluster computing using low power mobile chipsets. It was judged as a top ten startup and special funding was provided by the jury having members from Qualcomm and NASSCOM
- Qualcomm (External Consultant): Special lectures and training sessions on Processor Architecture, ARM ISA, Advanced electronics and current trends in mobile processors at Bangalore and Hyderabad sites

- To identify, define and Promote relevant ARM technology to the Industry partners and Academia
- To keep track of announcements and innovations in the area of mobile computing

- Make engineering divisions in Bangalore aware about the activities of worldwide ARM R&D activities
- Present and promote ARM technology in universities around the world
- Keep track of research in being carried out in the universities
- Duties involved – solving the problematic cases and bugs referred through from the field engineers. Suggesting possible steps to solve it or refer it to the R&D division with recommendations on changes to the RC tool.
- Mentoring to the younger members of the team and teach them how to isolate the problem using the right test cases
- Suggest a new algorithm for insertion of scan chain for test purpose – was taken up by San Jose center for detailed analysis. Suggested two power and device saving tricks for implementation in the RC Tool
- Developed Digital VLSI and computer architecture department from .scratch
- PG coordinator in 2002 -2003 and other administrative duties
- Guided 37 PG students and 80+ UG students in thesis and final projects
- Three projects by UG students won prizes at Intel, Cadence and TI competition

TITLE: Graphic Era Educational Society - Graphic Era Hill University, Dehradun

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Fee Structure Academic Calendar Hostel Fee Brochure
- Academics Department of Computer Science and Engineering Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering Department of Mechanical Engineering Department of Civil Engineering School of Management Department of Computer Application Department of English School of Commerce B.Voc in Accounting & Finance Allied Sciences School of Agriculture Law Design
- Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
- The Graphic Era Educational Society is a non-profit organization that aims to mobilize world class education and generate resources for providing and supporting quality education for all masses & public.
- Established in the year 1997, the society recognizes the right of every individual to lead a life of dignity and self-respect in a just and equitable manner. It also recognizes the need of time to build the capacities of both individuals and communities empowering them to face the ever changing global environment and excel in the fields of education, research and industrial interface.
- Graphic Era Institute of Technology established in 1997 carries a story of focused approach towards technical and professional education, training and innovative methods of teaching and learning. GEIT catered to the knowledge and skill set as per the industry needs and in tune with time. The Deemed to be status of the University awarded in August 2008, bears testimony to the quality of academic standards, delivery and assessment system adopted by it. GEU has more than 8000 students with great brilliance, academic vigor and competitive spirit. It has state-of-the-art infrastructure and amenities that provide a suitable and conducive learning environment. GEU is composed of an ethnically diverse student population and we find that diversity to be a source of great richness in our students’ educational experience.
- Under the aegis of Graphic Era Educational Society, a state-of-the-art “Graphic Era Hill University” has been setup in order to cater the needs of professional and technical education in the hilly regions of Uttarakhand. Graphic Era Hill University has campuses at Dehradun, Bhimtal and Haldwani.

TITLE: Quality Policy & Objectives - Graphic Era Hill University, Dehradun

- Admission Apply Now Scholarships Academic Fee Structure Academic Calendar Hostel Fee Brochure
- Academics Department of Computer Science and Engineering Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering Department of Mechanical Engineering Department of Civil Engineering School of Management Department of Computer Application Department of English School of Commerce B.Voc in Accounting & Finance Allied Sciences School of Agriculture Law Design
- Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering
- Graphic Era Hill University (GEHU) is ISO 9001: 2008 QMS Certified for imparting Education along with Research facilities in School of Engineering and Technology, School of Management Studies, School of Computer Application, School of Business Administration, School of Allied Sciences and School of Humanities.
- In line with the quality objectives and policy we, at GEHU, have been developing a rigorous system of quality assurance for higher education, with a view to continuously assess ways to protect and improve the quality of courses, curriculum, and research.
- The application process at Graphic Era is strictly based on the Merit of the qualifying examination with the entire Admission Process available for completion online

A student carrying a domicile from these states/or who has completed his 10th & 12th from these states is eligible for this consession - the states included in this list are: Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu Kashmir, Sikkim, Arunachal Pradesh, Manipur, Assam, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Tripura and Arunachal Pradesh.

A student carrying a domicile from these states/or who has completed his 10th & 12th from these states is eligible for this consession - the states included in this list are: Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu Kashmir, Sikkim, Arunachal Pradesh, Manipur, Assam, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Tripura and Arunachal Pradesh.
- #Diversity scholarship for candidates having 60% - 69.99% in 12th will be Rs. 3000 per sem
